description: old season stocks and Brand wants to pick them up, mail by Dipti.B on  Wed, May 2, 2012 at 10:24 AMComposition Tomato orange top made of 100% cotton, with a round neck, cap sleeves with double layered snipped edges, and chest print with metal embellishments Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print Transform your little darling into a princess with this top from doodle. The snipped edge cap sleeves and chest print add an element of sweetness, while the cotton fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Pair this top with a tiny skirt and colourful slippers to complete her princess look.
